misc: Primary organizer of the Hector Trophée event.
biography: Toni, a stalwart of the Hirsala Golf club, is more than just a participant in the Hector Trophée; he is its very lifeblood. As the primary organizer of this esteemed event, Toni's dedication to the sport and the spirit of competition is unparalleled.

With a remarkable record of 12 past appearances, Toni's experience is a cornerstone of the tournament. His three victories in the Hector Trophée stand as a testament to his skill and partnership, while his two Victor Trophy wins underscore his individual brilliance on the course.

Known for his meticulous approach to the game and an unwavering commitment to fair play, Toni embodies the values that the Hector Trophée seeks to promote. Despite the pressure of organizing the tournament, Toni's focus never wavers when he is on the course. Competitors know that Toni is a fierce player, and he is always looking to add to his impressive list of accolades. The upcoming Hector Trophée 2026 marks his 13th appearance, a milestone that further cements his legacy in the tournament's history.
